nasb.text: The other was named Eliezer, for he said, “The God of my father was my help, and delivered me from the sword of Pharaoh.”

esv.text: and the name of the other, Eliezer (for he said, “The God of my father was my help, and delivered me from the sword of Pharaoh”).

cnv.text: 一個名叫以利以謝，因為他說：“我父親的　神是我的幫助，救我脫離了法老的刀。”

ccb.text: 一个叫以利以谢，因为摩西说：“我父亲的上帝帮助我，从法老的刀下拯救了我。”
